audits.name: N6-structural-temporal-separation-clean-axis
audits.criterion: Law 2061 claims structural ratios use ONLY integer n6 atoms (tau/sopfr, n/sigma, phi/sopfr). 0 transcendental constants in structural-ratio fields. F3 falsifies if a structural ratio requires a transcendental.

coupling_uses_transcendentals_E_legit.classification_per_Law_2061: COUPLING, not pure structural ratio — bridges structure and dynamics, transcendental at bridge is allowed

audits.raw_10_caveat: raw 91 C3 honest dual reading: (a) STRICT reading: alpha uses transcendental e in n6_formula → F3 strictly FAIL on at least 1 structural derivation. (b) NUANCED reading: alpha is COUPLING constant (bridges structure/dynamics) so transcendental at the bridge is theoretically expected per Law 2061's own framework. Pure structural ratios (balance=1/2, n/sigma, tau/sopfr) are integer-only ✓. Verdict: PARTIAL_PASS — Law 2061 holds for pure ratios but coupling constants legitimately straddle.
audits.implication: Law 2061 should be re-stated more precisely: 'Pure structural RATIOS use integer atoms; COUPLING constants and FORMULAS that derive ratios may include transcendentals at the structure/dynamics bridge.' This is a SPEC CLARIFICATION, not a falsification.
